Title: Authorizes the town clerk of the town of Bethany, county of Genesee, to be nonresidents of such town
Summary: Authorizes the town clerk of the town of Bethany, county of Genesee, to be nonresidents of such town.
LawCode: Amd §23, Town L; amd §3, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the town law and the public officers law, in relation to authorizing the town clerk of the town of Bethany, county of Genesee, to be nonresidents of such town
